judgment.summary: A large, profitable company with strong returns and free cash flow, but facing slowing growth and high leverage.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat consensus by 0.7%; next earnings date is 2026-08-18.
positives: Return on equity 128.4% — exceptionally high, indicating efficient use of shareholder capital.
Free cash flow $10.13B TTM — strong cash generation supports dividends and buybacks.
Dividend yield 3.0% — attractive income for investors.
Operating margin 11.9% — healthy profitability on core operations.
Analyst consensus is 'buy' with a mean target of $372.85.
negatives: Debt/Equity 455.22 — very high leverage, potentially increasing financial risk.
Revenue growth 4.8% YoY and analyst estimates of 1.9% for the fiscal year suggest slowing top-line expansion.
Earnings growth -4.3% YoY and quarterly earnings growth -4.2% indicate current profitability challenges.
Quick ratio 0.23 — low, suggesting potential difficulty meeting short-term obligations without selling inventory.

news.paragraph: Home Depot's peer Lowe's reported sales growth driven by professional business, while Walmart flagged rising fuel costs impacting earnings. These headlines suggest a mixed environment for home improvement retailers, with potential headwinds from inflation and tailwinds from specific customer segments. Investors should monitor how these factors influence Home Depot's upcoming earnings report.

headlines.title: Walmart Flags Higher Fuel Costs Eroding Retailer’s Earnings
Lowe’s Sales Rise, Boosted by Pro Business Growth
Analyst Report: The Home Depot, Inc.

examples.body: $QXO ,$HD, $GS, $AMD, 23% short position in QXO, looking for strong reversal . They are participating in data center building .
$SPY Stagflation incoming. Home Depot is the canary in the coal mine. $HD
$HD commits $5.5M to disaster preparedness and community resilience ahead of storm season. https://www.rapidticker.com/news/hd-the-home-depot-foundation-invest…
